lanes.action: Reassign one blocking item immediately and split the lane across additional owners.

rebalance_items.handoff_reason: Current owner has a breaching item and should offload work to keep the queue moving.
rebalance_items.recommended_action: Increase joint damping and reduce actuator gain before changing controller structure.
